component.name: StorageSifter
component.summary: See what's using your disk space as an interactive treemap

description.p: StorageSifter is a fast, lightweight, GPU-accelerated disk-usage visualizer for Linux. It maps a filesystem as a squarified treemap — nested rectangles sized by what they actually consume on disk — so the biggest space hogs are obvious at a glance.

ul.li: Squarified treemap with smooth drill-down and animated zoom
Cells colored by what they are: caches/build output, media, code, documents, and more
Crosses Btrfs subvolumes and shows the boundaries clearly
Multi-select with move-to-trash and permanent delete, behind safety guardrails
"Safe to delete?" reports that identify a directory and suggest the proper cleanup command
